title: [Device Support Request] Tuya TS0001 – _TZ3000_gjrubzje (Single Relay + Metering)
excerpt:
Prerequisites
Homey Pro 2023

App: Tuya Zigbee (latest version)

Device paired directly to Homey (no Tuya hub)

Device Information
Manufacturer: _TZ3000_gjrubzje

Model: TS0001

Device Type: Router (mains powered)

IEEE Address: a4:c1:38:4c:3d:c2:df:c0

Network Address: 57713

Endpoints
Endpoint 1 → On/Off, Metering, Electrical Measurement

Endpoint 242 → GreenPower proxy

Interview
```json
{
  "ids": {
    "modelId": "TS0001",
    "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_gjrubzje"
  },
  "endpoints": {
    "ieeeAddress": "a4:c1:38:4c:3d:c2:df:c0",
    "networkAddress": 57713,
    "modelId": "TS0001",
    "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_gjrubzje",
    "endpointDescriptors": [
      {

        "nwkAddrOfInterest": 57713,
        "_reserved": 30,
        "endpointId": 1,
        "applicationProfileId": 260,
        "applicationDeviceId": 256,

        "_reserved1": 1,
        "inputClusters": [
          3,

          6,
          1794,

          57344,
          57345,
          0
        ],

          25,

        ]
      },
      {
        "status": "SUCCESS",
        "nwkAddrOfInterest": 57713,
        "_reserved": 10,
        "endpointId": 242,
        "applicationProfileId": 41440,
        "applicationDeviceId": 97,
        "applicationDeviceVersion": 0,
        "_reserved1": 0,
        "inputClusters": [],
        "outputClusters": [
          33
        ]
      }
    ],
    "deviceType": "router",
    "receiveWhenIdle": true,
    "capabilities": {
      "alternatePANCoordinator": false,
      "deviceType": true,
      "powerSourceMains": true,
      "receiveWhenIdle": true,
      "security": false,
      "allocateAddress": true
    },
    "extendedEndpointDescriptors": {
      "1": {
        "clusters": {
          "identify": { "attributes": [] },
          "groups": { "attributes": [] },
          "scenes": { "attributes": [] },
          "onOff": { "attributes": [] },
          "metering": { "attributes": [] },
          "electricalMeasurement": { "attributes": [] },
          "basic": { "attributes": [] }
        },
        "bindings": {}
      },
      "242": {
        "clusters": {},
        "bindings": {}
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Additional Notes
Device acts as a Zigbee router

Supports energy metering (kWh, W, V, A)

Tuya TS0001 variant with metering

Requires specific fingerprint because Tuya changes manufacturerName across batches

Unique manufacturerName: _TZ3000_gjrubzje

Expected Behaviour
Functional On/Off

Instant power reading (W)

Accumulated energy (kWh)

Voltage and current readings

Actual Behaviour
Paired as a generic device

No energy metering exposed

Not recognized as a Tuya switch

Request
Add fingerprint
{
  "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_gjrubzje",
  "modelId": "TS0001"
}
Map clusters
0x0006 → On/Off
0x0702 → Metering
0x0B04 → Electrical Measurement

Thanks in advance for your work on the Tuya Zigbee app!
aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue, here is the structured device information:

## Device Summary

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **ManufacturerName** | `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` |
| **ModelId (ProductId)** | `TS0001` |
| **Device Type** | Router (mains powered) |
| **IEEE Address** | `a4:c1:38:4c:3d:c2:df:c0` |
| **Network Address** | `57713` |

## Endpoints

| EP | Profile | Device ID | Input Clusters | Output Clusters |
|----|---------|-----------|----------------|-----------------|
| 1 | 260 (ZHA) | 256 (On/Off Light) | 0x0003 (Identify), 0x0004 (Groups), 0x0005 (Scenes), **0x0006 (OnOff)**, **0x0702 (Metering)**, **0x0B04 (ElectricalMeasurement)**, 0xE000, 0xE001, 0x0000 (Basic) | 0x0019 (OTA), 0x000A (Time) |
| 242 | 41440 (GreenPower) | 97 (Proxy) | None | 0x0021 (GreenPower) |

## Capabilities

| Capability | Value |
|------------|-------|
| Power Source | Mains |
| Device Type | Router |
| Receive When Idle | True |
| Alternate PAN Coordinator | False |
| Security | False |

## Requested Features

| Feature | Cluster | Expected Capability |
|---------|---------|---------------------|
| On/Off | 0x0006 (OnOff) | `onoff` |
| Instant Power (W) | 0x0B04 (ElectricalMeasurement) | `measure_power` |
| Accumulated Energy (kWh) | 0x0702 (Metering) | `meter_power` |
| Voltage (V) | 0x0B04 (ElectricalMeasurement) | `measure_voltage` |
| Current (A) | 0x0B04 (ElectricalMeasurement) | `measure_current` |

## Driver Recommendation

**Driver**: `plug_energy_monitor` or `switch_1gang` (with energy monitoring capabilities)

**Reasoning**:
- This is a **ZCL-only device** (no Tuya 0xEF00 cluster)
- Uses standard ZCL clusters: OnOff (0x0006), Metering (0x0702), ElectricalMeasurement (0x0B04)
- Mains powered (router)
- Single gang (Endpoint 1 only)

**Fingerprint to add**:
```json
{
  "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_gjrubzje",
  "productId": "TS0001"
}
```

**Note**: This is a **ZCL-only** device, not a TS0601 Tuya DP device. It should use standard ZCL cluster handlers, not the Tuya DP protocol. The existing `plug_energy_monitor` driver likely already supports these clusters and just needs the new fingerprint added.
